headline: AI chip stocks surge again as Nvidia’s Huang joins Trump on visit to China
summary: Investing.com -- Shares in semiconductor, optical networking, and data storage companies have surged in premarket trading on Wednesday, driven by tightening global memory chip supply and a boost in sentiment as Nvidia Chief Executive Jensen Huang joined President Donald Trump on his visit to China.

content.title: AI chip stocks surge again as Nvidia’s Huang joins Trump on visit to China

headline: A Look At Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) Valuation After Strong Q3 Results And Growing AI Infrastructure Optimism
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) is back in focus after fiscal Q3 2026 results came in above the high end of revenue and EPS guidance, with record margins and roughly US$1b in free cash flow. See our latest analysis for Seagate Technology Holdings. Even after a 3% pullback in the latest session, Seagate’s share price has surged recently, with a 60.8% 30 day share price return, a 98.6% 90 day share price return, and a year to date share price return of 181.3%. headline: If You Invested $1000 In Seagate Technology Hldgs Stock 20 Years Ago, You Would Have This Much Today
summary: Seagate Technology Hldgs (NASDAQ:STX) has outperformed the market over the past 20 years by 9.78% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 19.04%. Currently, Seagate Technology Hldgs has a market capitalization of $182.15 billion. Buying $1000 In STX: If an investor had bought $1000 of STX stock 20 years ago, it would be worth $32,558.32 today based on a price of $812.33 for STX at the time of writing.
